subcodes.first_line: O cherished handmaiden of God, render thanks unto the Lord that thou art sheltered beneath the protecting wing of 'Abdu'l-Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز خدا شکر کن پروردگار را که در سایه عصمت عزیز عبدالبهاء خسرو
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God
